title: L7 SOUL.md Frontmatter
description: Frontmatter for SOUL.md per SDD §3.2.5 + cycle-098 Sprint 7. Descriptive identity document, distinct from prescriptive CLAUDE.md. Body MUST contain 5 required sections (## What I am, ## What I am not, ## Voice, ## Discipline, ## Influences); optional sections (## Refusals, ## Glossary, ## Provenance) permitted. Section validation lives in the lib (extract+match), not in this JSON Schema.

identity_for.description: Subject of the identity document. Determines surfacing scope (this-repo always; others reserved for FU-5 construct-overlay).

provenance.description: Free-text author/source. Control bytes (0x00-0x1f, 0x7f) are rejected by the lib at parse-time as a defense-in-depth measure (mirrors L6 cycle-098 sprint 6 CYP-F2 closure of Python re.$ trailing-newline bypass).

last_updated.description: RFC 3339 date or date-time UTC. Operator-controlled; bounds-checked at write/validate-time (lib rejects [0001-01-01, now+24h) only — generous lower bound because operators may backdate identity docs to project inception).
